TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-pear-dakis 2020s

S.FORM: mhm eniqan kingan ah rudan ha.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人，
there is an old man.

S.FORM: maanu di mhada ciida hei na qhuni.
S.TRANSL: 水果成熟的時候。
when the fruit ripe

S.FORM: yaani kelaan na qutirodux uri ah so hari so hari qutirodux qitaan te kelaan so mhm nasi uri ini kelai.
S.TRANSL: 可能是芭樂或是梨子。
probably it is guava or pear.

S.FORM: ma qhuni na paru ha.
S.TRANSL: 水果很大。
the fruits are big.

S.FORM: tkhako musa lmamu ka rudan nii.
S.TRANSL: 老人走上梯子去採收。
the old man goes up ladder and he picks fruits.

S.FORM: ma madis hako.
S.TRANSL: （他）還帶梯子。
And also (he) carries a ladder.

S.FORM: ma paru ka paru ka ah qhuni kii bubu na qhuni ha.
S.TRANSL: 那棵樹很大，
the mother tree is big

S.FORM: ma lmamu lmamu ka ima di rudan nii.
S.TRANSL: 這老人在摘水果。
the old man is picking fruits.

S.FORM: ma i uxe beyo daha daha rawa ka lnmwan na hei qhuni ciida.
S.TRANSL: 然後他採兩籃水果的時候，
then when he picks two baskets of fruits,

S.FORM: ma moda hii ka kingan na riso rudan hari.
S.TRANSL: 一個青年經過那裡。
an elder boy passes there.

S.FORM: ma tmulus ah miric ha.
S.TRANSL: 他牽著羊，
he carries a sheep.

S.FORM: ma wada tmulus tmulus ma moda s moda toma mhm baki ga lmamu hei qhuni nii.
S.TRANSL: 牽著羊，他經過老人正在採水果的果樹下面。
then carrying the sheep, he passed under the tree that the old man is picking fruits.

S.FORM: kika wada moda elu wa wada hmrinas ma wada moda elu na kika REDosaun na ma qmlahang miric ah REDosaun na qmlahang miric osaun na tmabu miric peni.
S.TRANSL: 他經過，然後往他養羊的地方走去。
he passes, go toward the place where he raises sheep.

S.FORM: ma ini qbsiyaq eniqan kingan laqi.
S.TRANSL: 不久有一個小孩，
in a short while, there is a child.

S.FORM: eh s taapa rulu ha rulu ge jidensha ha.
S.TRANSL: 他在騎rulu。Rulu是腳踏車的意思。
he is riding a rulu. Rulu is a bike.

S.FORM: jidensha mesa kari tahtunux ma.
S.TRANSL: jidensha是日語。
jidensha is the Japanese word,

S.FORM: taapa jidensha laqi q laqi nii ma wisu uN moda toma inu di.
S.TRANSL: 然後這小孩騎腳踏車來下面...
the child is riding bike and he comes under...

S.FORM: eh moda mi mu musa qitaan na ga lmamu hei qhuni ka ba kingan rudan kiya ma mu musa ah qitaan na ye mesa lmamu hei qhuni ma ga waga baro ka rudan kii.
S.TRANSL: 他看到老人在上面採水果。
he saw the old man is picking fruits above.

S.FORM: kiya ka ciida de wada laqi nii.
S.TRANSL: 接著那時候這小孩離開了。
thus at that time, the child left.

S.FORM: qitaan na ka rudan kiya lmamu baro hii ma.
S.TRANSL: 他看老人在上面那裡採收，
he saw the old man, picking fruits up there.

S.FORM: ma kika i mesa ka ini ado ga maanu di ini kela ali lmamu ciida ka rudan nii ha ma im.
S.TRANSL: 然後那時候，老人專心地採收，
at that time, the old man is picking fruits very hard,

S.FORM: ye mesa ini ku naq ini na qitai ka laqi nii ciida we.
S.TRANSL: 他並不知道小孩在看。
he did not even know the child was looking.

S.FORM: wada gmulus mangan kingan maanu di kingan rawa na hei qhuni kii.
S.TRANSL: 他偷一籃水果。
he stole one basket of fruits.

S.FORM: so hari ah qutirodux qitaan ha.
S.TRANSL: 水果看起來是芭樂。
the fruit looks like guava.

S.FORM: ma qmita seediq kii qmit qmita qmita rudan di ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後他看這個老人，
then he sees the old man,

S.FORM: ye mesa ka t ini ini huwa ini qita ma.
S.TRANSL: 可能在說：「沒有關係，他沒在看。」
probably he is saying that 'it is okay, he is not seeing'.

S.FORM: wada na gruus madis gruusun na madis ciida ma.
S.TRANSL: 那時候他偷偷地帶走籃子，
at that time he stole and carried the basket.

S.FORM: ni gruusan na madis ye na eh ye na adisun inu ini kelai ye na baruyun ye na ini kelai.
S.TRANSL: 他偷偷帶走的果實，不曉得要帶到那裏或要賣。
the fruit he stealthily took away, I wonder where he brings or whether he sells.

S.FORM: wada moda elu ciida k moda elu ciida ini dehuk sapah dung we sterung kingan laqi mqedin.
S.TRANSL: 在路上，還沒到家的時候，他遇見一個女孩。
when he is on the way, before arriving at his house, he met a girl.

S.FORM: laqi mqedin uri gnduanr taapa densha uri.
S.TRANSL: 女孩也騎腳踏車來。
the girl also is riding a bike.

S.FORM: taapa densha ciida laqi nii laqi mqedin nii we.
S.TRANSL: 那時候女孩騎腳踏車，
at that time the girl was riding bike.

S.FORM: a ani qmita mu laqi mqedin nii ka ka laqi ah laqi rseno nii ma.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩看女孩，然後，
the boy sees the girl and then,

S.FORM: kika ini na kelai eniqan btunux ka elu ma ptebuk btunux ka maanu di jidensha na di ma takun ka laqi nii.
S.TRANSL: 所以他不知道路上有石頭，然後腳踏車撞到石頭，然後小孩跌倒。
So, he did not know that there was a stone in the road, the bike bumped into the stone, then the child fell.

S.FORM: takun ciida de cuwaq ka maanu di den ah hei qhuni lnuwan na.
S.TRANSL: 他跌倒，然後水果傾倒，
he fell down and then the fruit spilled.

S.FORM: ma bunuh na uri we wada wada odaan tmaus na laqi mqedin ma tqada so theya hari.
S.TRANSL: 帽子也飛走了，女孩碰落帽子，然後帽子摔出遠方。
the hat also went away. The girl touched it and it leaped far away.

S.FORM: lu hei qhuni lunam eh gnruusan na madis kingan rawa ge tqada theya quri icin ka kiya.
S.TRANSL: 所以，他偷偷帶來的一籃水果摔出去另一邊。
so the basket of fruits he stole spilled away to the other side.

S.FORM: ma kika takun laqi nii ma mangan tikuh luqah.
S.TRANSL: 小孩因為跌倒他受一點傷，
because the child fell, he got a little hurt.

S.FORM: ma kika qmita luqah na ga sdara peni.
S.TRANSL: 所以他看傷口有沒有流血。
So, he is looking at the scar to see if it is bleeding.

S.FORM: ma wisu ka teru lx teru laqi dung.
S.TRANSL: 然後三個小孩來，
then three children come.

S.FORM: kika teru ris teru laqi laq ah teru laqi ah.
S.TRANSL: 三個小孩來，
Three children came.

S.FORM: laqi r ah rseno nii ah qmita wa takun ka ima di ah gunu gnurus mangan ah hei qhuni laqi mhm mhm laqi mnangan hei qhuni nii ciida ma.
S.TRANSL: （三個小孩）看到那個偷拿水果的小孩跌倒了，
they saw the child who stealthily took fruits fell down.

S.FORM: ma rireh so dmayo mesa eh mhm.
S.TRANSL: 他們幫助他。
they are helping him.

S.FORM: ma kika mhedu dmayo ciida de ma adisun na di.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們幫忙完了後，他帶籃子。
then after they finished, he carried the basket.

S.FORM: ma kika wada lqlaqi wada naq teru nii maha theyaq laqi teru nii ini p.
S.TRANSL: 然後小孩們離開，三個小孩去玩。
then children left, the three children left to go to play.

S.FORM: ma ini t ini taapa.
S.TRANSL: 但是他沒有騎腳踏車，
but he does not ride bike.

S.FORM: i ma ye ado munang luqah laqi nii ma ini ye ani ini kbeyax maanu di ye na ini kmekuli qnleqah densha na di ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後可能這小孩受傷，他可能沒力氣踩腳踏車，
then maybe the child got hurt, he probably has no power to do to pedal the bike,

S.FORM: mkkesa ma tulusun na ka zidensya na nii ma kana gunu gnurus na madis kingan rawa maanu di hei qhuni nii wa ma kika.
S.TRANSL: 他牽著腳踏車走路，偷偷帶著一籃水果。
he is pulling the bike while waking, stealthily bringing the basket of fruits.

S.FORM: wo mkkesa tikuh ma qmita bukuy.
S.TRANSL: 他走了一下之後回頭看，
he walked a little and looked back.

S.FORM: ma qm qm mhm ah qmita teru laqi laqi wada dnayo heya di.
S.TRANSL: 他看了幫忙過他的那三個小孩。
he sees the three children who helped him.

S.FORM: ma teru na laqi deheya heya nii we eniqan kiya kingan.
S.TRANSL: 三個小孩,他們有一個...
the three children, they have one...

S.FORM: kiya m maanu di ah mqqita ma ciida ma kika ini ma mesa o ye mesa na heya ka bunuh nii ma kika haducun na.
S.TRANSL: 他們互相看，他們說帽子是他的，所以由其中一個送回來。
they looked at each other, and they said this is his hat, so one of them sent it back.

S.FORM: haducun na haducun na laqi nii ka bunuh nii ciida de kika laqi mntakun gnruus mangan hei qhuni ge angalun na ka teru hei qhuni di ma begeun na riso dnayo na deheya.
S.TRANSL: 他還帽子的時候，跌倒又偷水果的那孩子拿了三個水果，送給幫忙他的男孩們。
when he gave the hat back, the child who fell and stole fruits took three fruits and gave them, to the boy who helped him.

S.FORM: kika wada di.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們離開。
then they left.

S.FORM: ma wada pnkingan mekan nii mg mekan mekan di.
S.TRANSL: 每個人都邊走邊吃水果。
each one left eating the fruit.

S.FORM: de deheya teru nii ma moda kika ah ga na maanu di kika rudan ga lmamu a hei qhuni kiya.
S.TRANSL: 他們三個來到老人採水果那兒。
the three of them came to the place the old man is picking fruits.

S.FORM: mo knduwa naq moda hii elu na dungun ma.
S.TRANSL: 他們同樣是經過，
they passes the road as usual.

S.FORM: qmita ka rudan nii mesa.
S.TRANSL: 這老人看，
the old man sees.

S.FORM: eh hu mhm butu ah wa musa lmamu baro ssoni han wada na geeguyan na laqi nii ciida wa.
S.TRANSL: 先前小孩偷走的時候，他正好上去採收，
he went up to pick fruits when the child stole the fruit earlier.

S.FORM: ma kika rudan ciida de kika meyah ah tuting dheran ma meyah mita maanu di lnamu na hei qhuni.
S.TRANSL: 所以他下來的時候，看他採的水果。
so when he comes down, he sees the fruits he picked.

S.FORM: hi lngelung we malu so hari daha a rawa ah l lnamu mu soni malux ka m msngari kingan bale so hari mesa ga.
S.TRANSL: 「我剛才採了兩籃，為什麼現在只剩下一籃了？」他說。
"I have just picked two baskets of fruits. Why there left only one", he says.

S.FORM: so hari wgag ini na kelai lmngelung.
S.TRANSL: 他好像想不通，
he seems not confused.

S.FORM: oiwa mesa wada inu kingan ka mesa lmngelung peni na.
S.TRANSL: 他在想另一個籃子到哪去了。
he thinks where one basket is gone.

S.FORM: wisu ka deheya teru nii mkkesa moda hii ma mekan mekan hei qhuni kika quwaq na ma kika.
S.TRANSL: 他們三位走路經過那裡，嘴裏吃著那個樹果，
the three children passed there. They were eating the fruit.

S.FORM: ma lmngelung ah baki nii mesa ye ye we ma mhuwa mesa lmngelung uri ini mu kelai.
S.TRANSL: 所以這老人可能想，
so the old man probably thinks,

S.FORM: ma ini na kesai ye namu uxe gneeguyan uri ma.
S.TRANSL: 但是他也沒有問說「你們（的水果是不是）偷的？」然後，
but he did not say 'did you steal?' then,

S.FORM: ini na kesai eh ini na slingi ka riso nii ma wada naq theyaq ka teru riso nii.
S.TRANSL: 他並沒有質問男孩，然後男孩們就去玩了。
he did not ask to the young men and they went to play.
